name: Akaso Waterproof Case for V50 X

features.Key Features:: Compatible for : Akaso V50X New Version & V50X | Delivers maximum image sharpness above and below water. | Waterproof up to 30m-40m. | Adopted high light transmittance material,it will not affect photography effect. | It included: Anti-fog Inserts and Bracelet (P.S.Camera Not Included).
